zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Sandys於大約1465年出生在英國藍卡爾霍可黑阿德時，她的父親Sir Oliver Sandys16歲，母親Joane Leigh14歲。她於大約1496年與Sir Richard Weston MP結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1543年之後在英國素瑞塞頓 格林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Sandys于大约1465年出生在英国藍卡爾霍可黑阿德时，她的父亲Sir Oliver Sandys16岁，母亲Joane Leigh14岁。她于大约1496年与Sir Richard Weston MP结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1543年之后在英国素瑞塞頓 格林。

nameMeanings.name: Sandys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sands
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name from Middle English sandes ‘sands’, for someone who lived at or near a sandy place, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Sands in Carlisle (Cumberland) or Sands Cottages in West Hoathly (Sussex). See Sand , of which Sands may sometimes be a plural form or a variant, with excrescent -s. Compare also Sandes and Sandys .

History: Comfort Sands, a revolutionary patriot born in 1748 at what is now Sands’ Point, Long Island, NY, was descended from James Sand(y)s (1622–95), who emigrated from Reading, Berkshire, England, to Plymouth, MA, and followed Anne Hutchinson to Westchester County, NY, and subsequently RI. In 1661 he settled on Block Island, RI.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

variants.name: Nancy
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nan
meanings: Originally a pet form of Ann (for the initial N-, compare Ned ). It is now also widely used as a short form of Nancy .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Sandys was born about 1465, in Hawkshead, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Oliver Sandys, was 16 and her mother, Joane Leigh, was 14. She married Sir Richard Weston MP about 1496. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died after 1543, in Sutton Green, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Sandys est née environ 1465, à Hawkshead, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Oliver Sandys, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Joane Leigh, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Weston MP environ 1496. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée après 1543, à Sutton Green, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Sandys um 1465 in Hawkshead, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Oliver Sandys 16 und ihre Mutter Joane Leigh 14. Sie hat um 1496 Sir Richard Weston MP geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1543 in Sutton Green, Surrey, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Sandys è nata il circa 1465 nel Hawkshead, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir Oliver Sandys, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Joane Leigh, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Weston MP circa 1496. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì dopo il 1543, nel Sutton Green, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Sandysが約1465年にイギリスランカシュアイアハウクシェアドで生まれた時，父Sir Oliver Sandysは16歳，母Joane Leighは14歳であった。約1496年にSir Richard Weston MPと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1543年以後にイギリススリースットオン グレンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Sandys(이)가 대략 1465년 영국 랭카실르 호크셰아드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Oliver Sandys(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane Leigh(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 대략 1496년 Sir Richard Weston MP(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1543년 이후 영국 수리 수턴 그린에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Sandys nasceu aproximadamente 1465, em Hawkshead, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Oliver Sandys, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Joane Leigh, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Weston MP aproximadamente 1496. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1543, em Sutton Green, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Sandys родилась около 1465 г. в местности ховкшид, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Oliver Sandys было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane Leigh, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Weston MP около 1496 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла после 1543 г. в местности суттон грин, сурри, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Sandys nació aproximadamente 1465, en Hawkshead, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Oliver Sandys, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Joane Leigh, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Weston MP aproximadamente 1496. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió después de 1543, en Sutton Green, Surrey, Inglaterra.
